Fuchs Elephant Charge 2017

14 October 2017 · 📍 Luntente River

28 Entries
10 Completed
36% Finish rate
$111,138 Raised
11 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

The Bushpigs — For their selfless conduct during and after the charge.
